sections.title: Regulatory Framework — Quick Reference
sections.contentHtml:
The table below defines the governing framework for each compliance area. Use this as the authoritative reference when determining which law applies to a specific platform decision.

Compliance AreaGoverning Authority
Platform ObligationMLS feed access and display rules
Stellar MLS via PRAR / NAR IDX Policy 7.58Execute IDX/VOW agreements. Apply all display, attribution, purge, and compensation filter rules.
Agent license verificationJECVEBR — PR Examining Board / P.R. Laws Ann. tit. 20 Ch. 99A
Verify active license + $10,000 bond before granting listing access.Listing status and CCP compliance
Stellar MLS Rules / NAR CCP Policy 8.0Monitor public marketing triggers. Enforce 5 business day Stellar MLS PR entry window.
FinCEN AML screeningFinCEN RRE Rule — effective March 1, 2026
Screen and flag entity/trust buyers in non-financed transactions. Notario files — platform flags.Fair Housing — federal classes
Fair Housing Act (FHA) / HUD 2023 AI GuidanceAudit ranking algorithms for disparate impact. No steering on 7 federal protected classes.
Fair Housing — PR additional classesPuerto Rico civil rights laws
Extend algorithm audits to: political ideology, social condition, sexual orientation, source of income.ADA web accessibility
Title III ADA / WCAG 2.1 Level AAFull accessibility in English and Spanish. Annual screen-reader audit.
Email marketingCAN-SPAM Act
Opt-out model. Unsubscribe within 10 business days. $53,088/email violation penalty.STR listing compliance
PRTC (Tourism Company) / Act 272-2003Verify PRTC Innkeeper ID before publishing STR listing. Disclose 7% room tax.
Data privacyFTC Act Section 5 + state laws for out-of-PR users
No PR-specific privacy statute. Apply CCPA/VCDPA etc. for users in those states.Sold price disclosure
Puerto Rico is full disclosure jurisdictionNo non-disclosure restrictions. Sold prices available via VOW without limitation.
iMapp / Data Co-op toolsStellar MLS rules
These tools are for Florida properties only. Must be blocked for all PR-address listings.
